creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #5)
I know, but not easy for me to figure how to use the BSD license in the Linux world. Much easier for me to simply use GPLv2 which works easily and neatly.

BTW, I would like you to try sysutils/mkdesktop the next time you set up a FreeBSD desktop. It must be coolest way imagineable, and it is BSD-licensed
: - )
